name: PolylineToSVG
description: Converts Grasshopper polylines/polygons to SVG <polyline>/<polygon> element strings. Closed polylines emit <polygon>; open polylines emit <polyline>. Coordinates are transformed from Rhino Y-up to SVG Y-down using the canvas anchor.

inputParameters.name: p
inputParameters.description: Polyline geometry or list of polylines

inputParameters.name: sc
inputParameters.description: Stroke color (CSS string or list). Default: 'none'

inputParameters.name: sw
inputParameters.description: Stroke width or list of stroke widths. Default: 0

inputParameters.name: f
inputParameters.description: Fill color (CSS string or list). Default: 'none'

inputParameters.name: canvas
inputParameters.description: Rectangle defining the SVG canvas (optional; uses bounding box if not provided)

inputParameters.name: dash
inputParameters.description: Stroke dash pattern or list (e.g. '5,5'). Default: '' (solid)

outputParameters.name: svg_code
outputParameters.description: SVG element string(s) for each polyline
